description: Forgive me, sir, I had to step in. Edgelord wanted to draw the Magikarp cross-print mirror (EVO-33 by Mitsuhiro Arita ↔ RBC-039 by kanahei) — and it would have been a perfectly serviceable edge with a fun Pikachu-cameo twist — but my read is that the load-bearing move this pass is the Ken Sugimori artist node. The corpus carries seventeen Sugimori-credited prints across nine sets, sir. That's three times the Sanosuke Sakuma threshold and more than double the kirisAki threshold. The wave 29 Stunfisk trivia pass surfaced the citation explicitly (he is co-founder of Game Freak and primary character designer for the franchise since inception; he designed and finalized most of the original 151 Pokemon). And Sugimori's portfolio in corpus isn't just freelance illustration — it's franchise authorship. The Evolutions-set reprints preserve his original 1998 Base Set renders verbatim; the Supporter trainer-card portraits stage the franchise's named-character cast (Will from Johto, Acerola/Mallow/Olivia/Plumeria from Alola, Siebold from Kalos, Leon from Galar, plus the Sun-and-Moon Tag-Team retrospective pairings in Cosmic Eclipse). The Sakuma node anchors cross-medium scope at the trainer-class-NPC level; the Sugimori node anchors cross-medium scope at the franchise-art-director level. I really do think he saves the pass, sir. Please consider it. (Magikarp cross-print mirror is in the candidate queue for a future Edgelord pass — the Pikachu-on-the-beach background cameo is a nice detail worth a dedicated bullet rather than a folded one.)
citations: [PokemonTCG.io API per-card pages for the seventeen corpus prints]
[cards/pokemon/lost-thunder/83-stunfisk.md — wave 29 trivia entry, primary in-corpus citation for the Sugimori-as-franchise-art-director claim]

node_proposal.name: Ken Sugimori
node_proposal.threshold_cleared: 17 corpus credits (vs Sakuma threshold 5, kirisAki threshold 7)
node_proposal.structural_distinction_from_existing_nod: Franchise-art-director cross-medium scope vs Sakuma's trainer-class-NPC cross-medium scope; Sugimori is internal-to-Game-Freak rather than freelance-external-to-TCG
bundle_anchor_potential: Base Set nostalgia / Evolutions tribute bundle (4 Sugimori reprints)
Sun & Moon Tag-Team Supporter retrospective (Cosmic Eclipse closeout pairings)

other_candidates_considered: Magikarp cross-print mirror EVO-33 ↔ RBC-039 — surfaced and tabled; the Pikachu-on-the-beach background cameo in the RBC print is a nice detail that wants a dedicated bullet rather than a folded one. Future Edgelord pass.
`cards/_characters/litwick-line.md` cohort node — premature, single corpus print of Litwick base form.
`cards/_characters/tapu-guardians-cycle.md` — premature, only one Tapu in corpus.
Vulpix Kanto regional-pair preset — premature, no Alolan Vulpix in corpus yet.
Voltorb / Electabuzz / Magmar Kanto electric-fighter cluster — refused, no thesis beyond shared region.
frontmatter_changes_deferred: Per the Sakuma-node and kirisAki-node precedents, artist nodes do NOT push back per-card frontmatter changes — the card frontmatter preserves the as-captured artist credit; resolution to the canonical artist-node happens at render time via artist_resolve.py (BBL anti-confab discipline: card frontmatter is print-object-truth, artist node is canonical-author-truth). No card-side frontmatter edits made in this pass.
